message:
🌱 Add porter: Rethink interactive commands? mission (#1265)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "porter-1080-rethink-interactive-commands",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "porter: Rethink interactive commands?",
+    "description": "Rethink interactive commands?. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current porter deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your porter version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n porter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=porter\nhelm list -n porter 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working porter installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review porter configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant porter configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n porter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=porter\nkubectl get configmap -n porter -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=porter\n```\nI was reading the PR for adding `porter parameters generate` (where we are considering adding branching logic to skip adding parameters or default them based on the values in the bundle) and realized that these interactive generation commands have"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Rethink interactive commands?",
+        "description": "# What does this change\n * Adds Parameter Set generation cmds/logic\n * Refactors previous generation logic into common code and credential-/parameter-specific logic\n\n# What issue does it fix\r\nContributes towards https://github.com/deislabs/porter/issues/1053\n\n# Notes for the reviewer\nN/A\n```yaml\nporter credentials create NAME [--reference REFERENCE] [--dry-run] [--output yaml|plain]\nporter parameters create NAME [--reference REFERENCE] [--dry-run] [--output yaml|plain]\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n porter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=porter\nkubectl get events -n porter --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Rethink interactive commands?\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "# What does this change\n * Adds Parameter Set generation cmds/logic\n * Refactors previous generation logic into common code and credential-/parameter-specific logic\n\n# What issue does it fix\r\nContributes towards https://github.com/deislabs/porter/issues/1053\n\n# Notes for the reviewer\nN/A",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "porter credentials create NAME [--reference REFERENCE] [--dry-run] [--output yaml|plain]\nporter parameters create NAME [--reference REFERENCE] [--dry-run] [--output yaml|plain]",
+        "porter credentials create k8s -r example.com/kubernetes:v1.2.3 --dry-run -o json > k8s-creds.json",
+        "---\n# Generated by Porter\n# Credentials generated from example.com/kubernetes:v1.2.3\nschemaVersion: 1.0.0-DRAFT+b6c701f\n# Name of the credential set\nname: k8s\ncustom:\n  bundleReference: example.com/kubernetes:v1.2.3\ncreated: '2021-06-30T17:11:34.075214-05:00'\nmodified: '2021-06-30T17:11:34.075214-05:00'\ncredentials:\n# kubeconfig applies to: All Actions\n- name: kubeconfig\n  source:\n    # Replace the value field below with any of the following: secret, env, path, command or value\n    value: TODO\n# token applies to: install, upgrade\n- name: token\n  source:\n    # Replace the value field below with any of the following: secret, env, path, command or value\n    value: TODO"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "porter",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/getporter/porter/issues/1080",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/getporter/porter",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/getporter/porter/pull/1078"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
